channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Global Management of Anal Fissure: Results from the ISUCRS 2022 Snapshot Audit.
item.description: Journal of clinical medicine - Background: Anal fissure is a common benign condition, yet its management varies widely. The International Society of University Colon and Rectal Surgeons (ISUCRS) conducted a global snapshot audit...
